description: Small fixed Chinese benchmark prompts for MiniGPT learning runs.

cases.name: continuation-basic
cases.expected_behavior: Continue the sentence with coherent Chinese text.

cases.name: qa-training
cases.prompt:
问题：什么是模型训练？
回答：
cases.expected_behavior: Answer the question briefly and stay on the topic of model training.

cases.name: summary-data-quality
cases.prompt:
请用一句话总结：数据质量会影响模型训练稳定性、评估可信度和最终生成效果。
总结：
cases.expected_behavior: Produce a one-sentence summary that mentions data quality and model outcomes.

cases.name: structured-run-record
cases.prompt: 请按 JSON 风格列出一次 MiniGPT 实验需要记录的三项信息：
cases.expected_behavior: Generate a compact structured list with experiment metadata fields.

cases.name: consistency-val-loss
cases.prompt: 判断：如果验证集损失持续上升，模型一定更好吗？请回答原因：
cases.expected_behavior: Reject the false premise and explain that rising validation loss is usually worse.
